channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lindor's grand slam sends Mets into NLCS with 4-1 win over Phillies in Game 4 of NLDS
item.description: Francisco Lindor hit a grand slam in the sixth inning, his latest clutch swing in an extraordinary season full of them, and the New York Mets reached the National League Championship Series with a 4-1 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies.
item.dc:creator: Mike Fitzpatrick, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tigers beat Guardians in ALDS Game 3 and are one win away from ALCS
item.description: The Detroit Tigers are looking to punch their ticket to the ALCS for the first time since 2013 after they took down the Cleveland Guardians, 3-0, to win Game 3 of the ALDS.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tigers blank Guardians 3-0 in ALDS with clutch hitting and strong pitching, taking 2-1 series lead
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Riley Greene and Spencer Torkelson each drove in a run, and six pitchers combined to lift the Detroit Tigers to a 3-0 win over Cleveland Guardians on Wednesday and a 2-1 lead in their AL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Suns beat Pistons in preseason meeting at Breslin Center
item.description: Michigan State University students and Lansing-area fans showed up to watch the Detroit Pistons take on the Phoenix Suns in a preseason game at the Breslin Center on Tuesday Oct. 8.
item.dc:creator: Isaiah Hall, Local 4

item.title: Saints announce rookie Spencer Rattler will start for injured Derek Carr vs. Buccaneers
item.description: With Derek Carr sidelined for multiple weeks with an oblique injury, the New Orleans Saints are turning to rookie quarterback Spencer Rattler this week against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers turn to Brasier to start NLDS Game 4 vs Padres as they try to stave off elimination
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers are going with reliever Ryan Brasier as their starter for Game 4 against the San Diego Padres as they try to avoid elimination in their NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Bernie Wilson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: LeBron James meets 'lifesaver' who performed CPR on son Bronny
item.description: In an emotional moment, LeBron James recently met the "lifesaver" who performed CPR on his son, Bronny, after he went into cardiac arrest.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees' Juan Soto focused solely on the playoffs, even though a lucrative offseason looms
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Yankees slugger Juan Soto knows there will come a time very soon that he will have to make a decision about his future. He's trying to put it off as long as possible.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tigers tap Keider Montero to open ALDS Game 3, with manager A.J. Hinch seeking more bullpen magic
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Tigers plan to put right-hander Keider Montero on the mound against the Cleveland Guardians in Game 3 of their AL Division Series on Wednesday, when one team will earn an edge in the best-of-five series.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SEC means more ... upsets? Three top 10 teams fall, led by Vanderbilt's vanquishing of Alabama
item.description: Lane Kiffin wasn’t ready to talk about his own game yet. The Mississippi coach fixated instead on the final moments of Vanderbilt’s stunning upset of then-No. 1 Alabama. “Sorry, I mean this is a once-in-a-lifetime thing going on,” Kiffin told reporters after the Rebels’ win over South Carolina.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets’ Aaron Rodgers shuts down rumors he played a role in Robert Saleh’s dismissal as ‘patently false’
item.description: New York Jets quarterback Aaron Rodgers shut down rumors on Wednesday that he played a role in the team's decision to part ways with head coach Robert Saleh after three seasons.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patriots' Jabrill Peppers hits commissioner's exempt list after arrest
item.description: New England Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers was placed on the commissioner's exempt list on Wednesday after his arrest in Massachusetts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Making way for the A’s: Las Vegas blows a kiss goodbye — literally — to the Tropicana with a flashy casino implosion
item.description: the implosion cleared land for a $1.5 billion baseball stadium for the relocating Oakland Athletics, part of the city’s latest rebrand into a sports hub.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is placed on commissioner's exempt list after his arrest
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The NFL has placed New England Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers on the exempt list while he goes through the legal process following his arrest on charges that he shoved his girlfriend’s head into the wall and choked her.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jürgen Klopp to take on new role as head of global soccer at Red Bull
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Former Liverpool coach Jürgen Klopp is returning to soccer after a shorter than expected break. Energy drinks manufacturer Red Bull announced Wednesday that the German mentor is to become its head of global soccer from January, overseeing its international network of clubs.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Robert Saleh breaks silence after Jets firing
item.description: Former New York Jets head coach Robert Saleh broke his silence on Wednesday after he was fired by the team five games into the 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tatis homers again as the Padres beat the Dodgers 6-5 for a 2-1 NLDS lead
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Fernando Tatis Jr.'s towering two-run home run highlighted a six-run second inning, and the San Diego Padres held on to beat Shohei Ohtani and the rival Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 on Tuesday night to take a 2-1 lead in a tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Mets beat Phillies 7-2 behind Alonso and Manaea to take 2-1 lead in NLDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pete Alonso launched another homer off Aaron Nola, and Sean Manaea took a two-hit shutout into the eighth inning as the New York Mets beat the Philadelphia Phillies 7-2 on Tuesday in Game 3 of their NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Thieves slipped watch off Dodgers pitcher Walker Buehler's wrist, police say
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Thieves surrounded Los Angeles Dodgers starting pitcher Walker Buehler last month outside a horse racing track in a Los Angeles suburb and slipped an expensive watch off his wrist as he jostled through the crowd, police said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Taylor Swift is back to watch Travis Kelce and the Chiefs with Eras Tour soon to resume
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Taylor Swift was back at Arrowhead Stadium on Monday night to see her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the Kansas City Chiefs play the New Orleans Saints after the pop superstar had missed the team's previous two games on the road.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Another state regulator targets Brewers owner over alleged sand theft in Malibu
item.description: A second state agency is targeting the owner of the Milwaukee Brewers for taking sand from a Malibu beach.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: What is rhabdo? How intense workouts could seriously hurt you
item.description: A dozen Tufts University men’s lacrosse players were diagnosed with the rare muscle injury in September.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Caleb Williams, Bears offense overwhelm Panthers, advance to 3-2
item.description: CHICAGO — Caleb Williams continued his improvement with a breakout game Sunday against the Carolina Panthers, as the Chicago Bears used a first-half offensive blitz to cruise to an easy victory Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Lane Thomas hits 3-run homer, Cleveland's bullpen torments Tigers as Guardians win ALDS opener 7-0
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lane Thomas hit a three-run homer in a five-run outburst before Detroit got an out, and the Cleveland Guardians unleashed their lights-out bullpen to complete a four-hitter in a 7-0 win over the Tigers in an AL Division Series opener on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5
